mapper.sql: select id, customer_id, task_id, task_no, asset_id, asset_name, spec, model, unit_price, manufacturer, serial_number, rfid_epc, equipment_serial_no, print_status, print_count, last_print_time, barcode_type, del_flag, del_by, del_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sb_asset_print_task_item
mapper.select: where task_id = #{taskId} and customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) order by create_time asc
mapper.insert: insert into sb_asset_print_task_item (id, customer_id, task_id, task_no, asset_id, asset_name, spec, model, unit_price, manufacturer, serial_number, rfid_epc, equipment_serial_no, print_status, print_count, barcode_type, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{taskId}, #{taskNo}, #{assetId}, #{assetName}, #{spec}, #{model}, #{unitPrice}, #{manufacturer}, #{serialNumber}, #{rfidEpc}, #{equipmentSerialNo}, #{printStatus}, #{printCount}, #{barcodeType}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})

insert into sb_asset_print_task_item (id, customer_id, task_id, task_no, asset_id, asset_name, spec, model, unit_price, manufacturer, serial_number, rfid_epc, equipment_serial_no, print_status, print_count, barcode_type, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{item.id}, #{tenantId}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.taskNo}, #{item.assetId}, #{item.assetName}, #{item.spec}, #{item.model}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.manufacturer}, #{item.serialNumber}, #{item.rfidEpc}, #{item.equipmentSerialNo}, #{item.printStatus}, #{item.printCount}, #{item.barcodeType}, 0, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime})
mapper.update: update sb_asset_print_task_item set del_flag = 1, del_by = #{delBy}, del_time = now(), update_by = #{delBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and customer_id = #{scopedTenantId}
update sb_asset_print_task_item set del_flag = 1, del_by = #{delBy}, del_time = now(), update_by = #{delBy}, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId} and customer_id = #{scopedTenantId}
